items.title: If You’re a Serious Bowler, You Need to Know About Bowling Lane Oil
items.summary: Bowling centers apply oil to their lanes using a machine that works like a giant inkjet printer. The pattern in which it’s applied can change everything about how the ball travels.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
